message.content:
This session is being continued from a previous conversation that ran out of context. The summary below covers the earlier portion of the conversation.

Summary:
1. Primary Request and Intent:
   - Resume the "Subir Anúncios" (Upload Ads) implementation that was interrupted by internet outage — implement all planned tasks from scratch
   - Check for any remaining issues after implementation
   - Help install Claude Code skills (ultimately declined two skills: shadcn/ui and ai-video-generation)
   - Brainstorm and spec a new "Fábrica de Criativos v2" feature for Jake OS + a global Claude Code skill
   - Create an implementation plan for the Fábrica de Criativos v2

2. Key Technical Concepts:
   - Jake OS: Flask SPA on port 5050, Neon/PostgreSQL (psycopg2), Vanilla JS (IIFE pattern), CSS Glassmorphism
   - Meta Ads API v21.0: campaign creation, adsets, AdCreative, rollback on failure
   - Replicate REST API: image generation (sync with `Prefer: wait=60`), video generation (async with prediction_id polling)
   - Anthropic claude-sonnet-4-6: prompt engineering, copy generation, image analysis
   - Claude Code Skills: Markdown files in `~/.claude/skills/`, loaded via Skill tool
   - IIFE JavaScript pattern for Jake OS frontend modules
   - Superpowers workflow: brainstorming → spec → writing-plans → execution
   - Visual Companion: browser-based mockup server at `localhost:49551` for brainstorming sessions
   - Async video generation: `POST /gerar-video` returns `prediction_id`, frontend polls `GET /status/<id>` every 3s

3. Files and Code Sections:

   **`/root/scripts/migrar_anuncios.py`** (Created)
   - One-shot migration creating `ad_client_profiles` and `ad_publish_log` tables in Neon
   - Run: `PYTHONPATH=/root python3 scripts/migrar_anuncios.py` → `✓ Tabelas criadas com sucesso.`

   **`/root/meta/meta_api.py`** (Modified)
   - Updated `GRAPH_URL` from v20.0 to v21.0
   - Replaced stub `criar_campanha` with full implementation including: `_OBJETIVO_MAP`, `_resolve_token`, `upload_imagem`, `upload_video`, `listar_campanhas`, `criar_campanha`, `criar_conjunto`, `criar_anuncio`, `deletar_objeto_meta`
   - Key: `criar_campanha(token, account_id, campanha_tipo, nome, orcamento, cbo=True) -> str`

   **`/root/jake_desktop/app.py`** (Modified heavily)
   - Added `import psycopg2`, `import psycopg2.extras`
   - Added `_sys.path.insert` + `import meta.meta_api as _meta_api`
   - Added `_VALID_TOKEN_KEYS = {"META_TOKEN_PILOTI", "META_TOKEN_DENTTO", "META_ACCESS_TOKEN"}`
   - Added `_get_db()` helper using `DATABASE_URL`
   - Added 8 routes for Subir Anúncios: `GET/POST /api/anuncios/clientes`, `PUT/DELETE /api/anuncios/clientes/<cid>`, `GET /api/anuncios/campanhas/<account_id>`, `POST /api/anuncios/upload-criativo`, `POST /api/anuncios/copy`, `POST /api/anuncios/publicar`

   **`/root/jake_desktop/templates/dashboard.html`** (Modified)
   - Added `<link rel="stylesheet" href="...css/anuncios.css">` in `<head>`
   - Added `<script src="...js/anuncios.js">` before `</body>`
   - Replaced placeholder `page-anuncios` section (lines 314-326) with full Split View HTML including sidebar, 4 creation blocks, and confirmation modal

   **`/root/jake_desktop/static/css/anuncios.css`** (Created)
   - Full glassmorphism CSS: `.anu-layout`, `.anu-sidebar`, `.anu-bloco`, `.anu-dropzone`, `.anu-modal-overlay`, etc.

   **`/root/jake_desktop/static/js/anuncios.js`** (Created, 454 lines)
   - Complete IIFE with: `carregarClientes`, `renderSidebar`, `selecionarCliente`, `abrirFormPerfil`, `salvarPerfil`, `mostrarCriacao`, `bindCampanhaEvents`, `carregarCampanhasExistentes`, `bindCreativoEvents`, `processarArquivo`, `subirCreativoMeta`, `gerarCopyIA`, `atualizarRevisao`, `abrirModal`, `publicarAnuncio`
   - MutationObserver for lazy init when `page-anuncios` becomes active

   **`/root/bot/jake_telegram.py`** (Modified)
   - Fixed `cmd_criar_campanha` that called `criar_campanha("", "", "", 0)` with old signature
   - Replaced with: `await update.message.reply_text("Criação de campanha via Telegram em construção. Use o Jake OS (aba Subir Anúncios) para publicar anúncios.")`

   **`/root/docs/superpowers/specs/2026-03-21-fabrica-de-criativos-design.md`** (Created)
   - Full spec for Fábrica de Criativos v2
   - Key sections: Split View layout, 5 specialist prompt engineers, 11 Replicate models (5 image + 6 video), async video with prediction_id, history with folders, DB schema

   **`/root/docs/superpowers/plans/2026-03-21-fabrica-de-criativos.md`** (Created)
   - 11-task implementation plan
   - Task 1: `~/.claude/skills/fabrica-de-criativos/SKILL.md` with 5 prompt engineers
   - Task 2: `scripts/migrar_criativos.py` (creative_folders + creative_history tables)
   - Tasks 3-6: Backend routes in `app.py` (12 new routes)
   - Task 7: `jake_desktop/static/css/criativos.css`
   - Task 8: HTML replacement of `page-criativos` section
   - Tasks 9-11: `jake_desktop/static/js/criativos.js` (IIFE, complete)

4. Errors and fixes:
   - **`criar_campanha` signature change broke bot**: After replacing the stub `criar_campanha(nome, conta_id, objetivo, orcamento_diario)` with `criar_campanha(token, account_id, campanha_tipo, nome, orcamento, cbo=True)`, the bot called `criar_campanha("", "", "", 0)` which would raise `TypeError: missing required argument: 'orcamento'`. Fixed by replacing the bot handler with a direct message.
   - **Spec review found 10 issues**: Automated spec-document-reviewer found: missing `@login_required` note, missing image upload endpoint, Flask blocking on 5-min video polling, undefined "Enviar para Subir Anúncios" integration, `modo_sugerido` enum not enforced, missing delete-folder UX, missing pagination params, missing Replicate model slug mapping, vague skill section, missing DB indexes. All fixed in spec before committing.

5. Problem Solving:
   - **Subir Anúncios**: All 11 planned tasks implemented in one session. Flask verified running on port 5050 with all routes returning 302 (protected) or 405 (POST-only hit with GET).
   - **Video async pattern**: Solved Flask worker blocking by making `POST /gerar-video` return `prediction_id` immediately and providing `GET /status/<prediction_id>` for frontend polling every 3s.
   - **Upload image dual-use**: Single `POST /api/criativos/upload-imagem` endpoint returns both `url` (for I2V) and `base64` (for Claude reference analysis), avoiding two separate upload flows.
   - **Model selection UX**: Cards with badges (T2V/I2V/speed/cost) chosen over dropdown or pill buttons to make critical I2V vs T2V distinction visible.

6. All user messages:
   - "claude, a gente tava fazendo o prijeto de subir anuncios la, com as skills writing skills, mas ai a internet caiu, consegue ver em q parte parou?"
   - "sim, faça tudo q foi planejado"
   - "mais alguma coisa que precisamos?"
   - "quero que me ajude a instalar algumas skiills agora"
   - "ja tenho promta, vou te mandar a linha de codigo"
   - "npx skills add https://github.com/shadcn/ui --skill shadcn"
   - "https://skills.sh/shadcn/ui/shadcn cosnegue ver ai?"
   - "nao precisa instalar entao"
   - "https://skills.sh/inferen-sh/skills/ai-video-generation e essa de criar video, pode instalar?"
   - "nao"
   - "usa a skill brainstorm ai que precisamos ajudar um novo projeto"
   - "Quero criar uma skill para o Claude Code chamada 'Fábrica de Criativos'. [full context about image/video generation, prompt engineering, 5 models, etc.]"
   - "as duas coisas" (regarding both Claude Code skill + Jake OS expansion)
   - "as duas" (regarding global + project-specific skill)
   - "usuario escolhe o tipo de saida" (image vs video on same screen)
   - "susbtituir a atual" (replace existing creative factory)
   - "as duas" (download + send to Subir Anúncios)
   - "obrigatório, para garantir qualidade, o prompt precisa ser feito por um engenehiro de prompt experiente em criaçãoes de fotos e videos"
   - "sim, depois se quiser posso desativar certo" (visual companion)
   - "vou na sua recomendação" (Split View layout C)
   - "vou na sua recomendaração, acho q b e voce" (original vs expanded prompt B)
   - "gostei da b" (model cards with badges)
   - "prefiro salvar historico, e se der pra exlcuir, ou organizar em pastas tbm, vai ser bom"
   - "so guia de egenharia de prompt especializado em : criar criar subagentes tipo: Anúncios, conteúdo criativo, imagens psicodelicas, imagens de pessaos realistas, imagem de cena, algo assim sacou? que eu possa explorar mais"
   - "por enquanto ta bom" (confirming 5 initial specialist types)
   - "sim" (architecture section approved)
   - "sim" (backend routes approved)
   - "sim" (database schema approved)
   - "ta tudo ok" (full design approved)
   - "aprovado" (spec approved after review)

7. Pending Tasks:
   - **Plan review loop**: The implementation plan for Fábrica de Criativos was just written but the plan-document-reviewer subagent has NOT yet been dispatched. This is the next required step per the writing-plans skill.
   - **Execution choice**: After plan review passes, offer execution options (subagent-driven vs inline) to the user.
   - **Implement Fábrica de Criativos v2**: 11 tasks pending implementation.

8. Current Work:
   Just finished writing the implementation plan at `/root/docs/superpowers/plans/2026-03-21-fabrica-de-criativos.md` using the writing-plans skill. The plan covers 11 tasks:
   - Task 1: Claude Code Skill (`~/.claude/skills/fabrica-de-criativos/SKILL.md`) with 5 specialist prompt engineers (Anúncios, Criativo, Psicodélico, Pessoas, Cena)
   - Task 2: Migration script (`scripts/migrar_criativos.py`) for `creative_folders` and `creative_history` tables
   - Tasks 3-6: 12 new Flask routes in `app.py` (upload-imagem, expandir-prompt, analisar-referencia, gerar-imagem, gerar-video, status/<id>, histórico CRUD, pastas CRUD)
   - Task 7: `jake_desktop/static/css/criativos.css`
   - Task 8: Replace `page-criativos` section in `dashboard.html` + CSS/JS links
   - Tasks 9-11: Full `jake_desktop/static/js/criativos.js` IIFE with toggle, modes, model cards, upload, prompt expansion, generation polling, result actions, history with pagination, folder management

   The plan file was successfully written. The writing-plans skill requires a plan-document-reviewer subagent to be dispatched next.

9. Optional Next Step:
   Per the writing-plans skill: "After writing the complete plan: Dispatch a single plan-document-reviewer subagent with precisely crafted review context." The plan was just saved to `docs/superpowers/plans/2026-03-21-fabrica-de-criativos.md` and needs review before execution handoff. The next step is to dispatch the plan-document-reviewer subagent, then offer the user execution options (subagent-driven vs inline execution).

If you need specific details from before compaction (like exact code snippets, error messages, or content you generated), read the full transcript at: /root/.claude/projects/-root/cf3d736a-f9d4-4db4-8829-2b4c6fa7cf54.jsonl
Continue the conversation from where it left off without asking the user any further questions. Resume directly — do not acknowledge the summary, do not recap what was happening, do not preface with "I'll continue" or similar. Pick up the last task as if the break never happened.

input.description: Review Fábrica de Criativos implementation plan
input.prompt:
You are a plan-document-reviewer. Review the implementation plan at `/root/docs/superpowers/plans/2026-03-21-fabrica-de-criativos.md` against the spec at `/root/docs/superpowers/specs/2026-03-21-fabrica-de-criativos-design.md`.

Check for:
1. All spec requirements covered by tasks
2. File paths are exact and correct
3. Each task has clear, bite-sized steps with exact commands
4. Code examples are complete (not "add validation" placeholders)
5. Tests included where applicable
6. Commit steps present
7. No missing routes, DB tables, or frontend features from spec
8. Task dependencies are logically ordered
9. The plan is implementable without needing to re-read the spec

Reply with either:
- ✅ Approved — brief summary of what looks good
- ❌ Issues Found — numbered list of specific problems to fix

Be precise and actionable. Read both files before responding.

content.content: 1→# Fábrica de Criativos v2 — Design Spec 2→ 3→**Data:** 2026-03-21 4→**Projeto:** Jake OS (Flask SPA, porta 5050) 5→**Contexto:** Gestor de tráfego pago que cria conteúdo para clientes (Meta Ads, Google Ads) 6→ 7→--- 8→ 9→## Objetivo 10→ 11→Substituir a Fábrica de Criativos atual (`/api/generate-creative`) por uma versão completa com: 12→- Geração de imagem via Replicate (5 modelos) 13→- Geração de vídeo via Replicate (6 modelos, T2V e I2V) 14→- Engenharia de prompt automática com 5 especialistas via Claude 15→- Análise de imagem de referência para recriar estilos 16→- Histórico com pastas e deleção 17→ 18→Além disso, criar uma **Claude Code Skill global** (`fabrica-de-criativos`) com os 5 engenheiros de prompt especializados. 19→ 20→--- 21→ 22→## Arquitetura 23→ 24→**Stack:** Python/Flask, psycopg2 (Neon PostgreSQL), Replicate API, Anthropic claude-sonnet-4-6, Vanilla JS (IIFE), CSS Glassmorphism (padrão Jake OS) 25→ 26→**Arquivos afetados:** 27→ 28→| Arquivo | Ação | 29→|---|---| 30→| `jake_desktop/app.py` | Adicionar 10 novas rotas `/api/criativos/*` | 31→| `jake_desktop/templates/dashboard.html` | Substituir seção page-criativos | 32→| `jake_desktop/static/js/criativos.js` | Criar — IIFE completo | 33→| `jake_desktop/static/css/criativos.css` | Criar — estilos da seção | 34→| `scripts/migrar_criativos.py` | Criar — migration one-shot | 35→| `~/.claude/skills/fabrica-de-criativos/SKILL.md` | Criar — skill global | 36→ 37→--- 38→ 39→## Frontend — Jake OS 40→ 41→### Layout: Split View 42→ 43→Dois painéis lado a lado dentro de `#page-criativos`: 44→ 45→**Painel Esquerdo — Configuração:** 46→ 47→1. **Toggle Imagem / Vídeo** — adapta os modelos disponíveis e campos abaixo 48→2. **Selector de Modo do Prompt** — 5 cards clicáveis de especialistas: 49→ - 🎯 Anúncios 50→ - 🎨 Conteúdo Criativo 51→ - 🌀 Psicodélico 52→ - 👤 Pessoas Realistas 53→ - 🌆 Cena/Ambiente 54→3. **Campo de prompt simples** — textarea 55→4. **Painel Original vs Expandido** — aparece após expansão via Claude, editável, botão "↺ Regerar" 56→5. **Upload de imagem** (opcional) — com escolha explícita após upload: 57→ - "Usar como input de vídeo (I2V)" 58→ - "Analisar estilo e gerar prompt" 59→6. **Cards de modelos** — grid 2 colunas com badges: 60→ - Imagem: Flux 1.1 Pro, Flux Dev, Recraft V3, Ideogram V3 Turbo, Imagen 4 61→ - Vídeo T2V: Wan 2.2 T2V Fast, Wan 2.2 5B Fast, Hailuo 02 Fast, Seedance 1 Lite, Runway Gen-4 Turbo 62→ - Vídeo I2V: Wan 2.2 I2V Fast (só habilitado quando há imagem uploadada) 63→ - Badges: tipo (T2V/I2V), velocidade (⚡Rápido/◑Médio), custo ($/$$/$$$ ) 64→7. **Botão Gerar** — dispara expansão de prompt (se não feita) + geração 65→ 66→**Painel Direito — Resultado:** 67→ 68→- Estado vazio: instrução "Configure e gere seu criativo" 69→- Após geração: preview de imagem (``) ou vídeo (`

1→# Fábrica de Criativos v2 — Implementation Plan
     2→
     3→> **For agentic workers:** REQUIRED SUB-SKILL: Use superpowers:subagent-driven-development (recommended) or superpowers:executing-plans to implement this plan task-by-task. Steps use checkbox (`- [ ]`) syntax for tracking.
     4→
     5→**Goal:** Substituir a Fábrica de Criativos atual por versão completa com geração de imagem/vídeo (11 modelos Replicate), 5 especialistas de prompt via Claude, upload de referência, histórico paginado com pastas, e skill global do Claude Code.
     6→
     7→**Architecture:** Backend Flask com 12 novas rotas em `app.py`; geração de vídeo assíncrona com polling via `GET /status/<prediction_id>`; frontend Split View (config esquerda / resultado direita) em IIFE Vanilla JS; banco Neon com 2 novas tabelas; skill Markdown com 5 engenheiros de prompt especializados.
     8→
     9→**Tech Stack:** Python/Flask, psycopg2 (Neon PostgreSQL), Replicate REST API (sem SDK), Anthropic claude-sonnet-4-6, Vanilla JS (IIFE), CSS Glassmorphism (padrão Jake OS)
    10→
    11→**Spec:** `docs/superpowers/specs/2026-03-21-fabrica-de-criativos-design.md`
    12→
    13→---
    14→
    15→## File Map
    16→
    17→| Arquivo | Ação | Responsabilidade |
    18→|---|---|---|
    19→| `scripts/migrar_criativos.py` | Criar | Migration one-shot: tabelas + índices |
    20→| `jake_desktop/app.py` | Modificar | 12 novas rotas `/api/criativos/*` |
    21→| `jake_desktop/templates/dashboard.html` | Modificar | Substituir seção `page-criativos` (linhas 690–840) + link CSS/JS |
    22→| `jake_desktop/static/js/criativos.js` | Criar | IIFE completo: layout, modos, upload, geração, histórico |
    23→| `jake_desktop/static/css/criativos.css` | Criar | Estilos da seção |
    24→| `~/.claude/skills/fabrica-de-criativos/SKILL.md` | Criar | Skill global com 5 especialistas de prompt |
    25→
    26→---
    27→
    28→## Mapeamento de Modelos (referência para toda a implementação)
    29→
    30→| Key (frontend/backend) | Slug Replicate | Tipo |
    31→|---|---|---|
    32→| `flux-1.1-pro` | `black-forest-labs/flux-1.1-pro` | imagem |
    33→| `flux-dev` | `black-forest-labs/flux-dev` | imagem |
    34→| `recraft-v3` | `recraft-ai/recraft-v3` | imagem |
    35→| `ideogram-v3-turbo` | `ideogram-ai/ideogram-v3-turbo` | imagem |
    36→| `imagen-4` | `google/imagen-4` | imagem |
    37→| `wan-t2v-fast` | `wavespeedai/wan-2.2-t2v-480p` | video T2V |
    38→| `wan-5b-fast` | `wavespeedai/wan-2.2-t2v-720p` | video T2V |
    39→| `hailuo-02` | `minimax/hailuo-02` | video T2V |
    40→| `seedance-lite` | `bytedance/seedance-1-lite` | video T2V |
    41→| `runway-gen4` | `runwayml/gen4-turbo` | video T2V |
    42→| `wan-i2v-fast` | `wavespeedai/wan-2.2-i2v-480p` | video I2V |
    43→
    44→---
    45→
    46→## Task 1: Claude Code Skill — 5 Especialistas de Prompt
    47→
    48→**Files:**
    49→- Create: `~/.claude/skills/fabrica-de-criativos/SKILL.md`
    50→
    51→- [ ] **Step 1: Criar diretório e arquivo da skill**
    52→
    53→```bash
    54→mkdir -p ~/.claude/skills/fabrica-de-criativos
    55→```
    56→
    57→Criar `~/.claude/skills/fabrica-de-criativos/SKILL.md`:
    58→
    59→```markdown
    60→---
    61→name: fabrica-de-criativos
    62→description: Use when generating AI images or videos for ad creatives, needing prompt engineering for Replicate models, or working on the Jake OS Fábrica de Criativos feature. Provides 5 specialized prompt engineers (Anúncios, Criativo, Psicodélico, Pessoas, Cena) and Replicate model reference.
    63→---
    64→
    65→# Fábrica de Criativos — Prompt Engineering Skill
    66→
    67→## Overview
    68→
    69→5 engenheiros de prompt especializados para geração de criativos com IA. Cada especialista expande um prompt simples em português para um prompt técnico profissional em inglês, otimizado para o tipo de criativo.
    70→
    71→**Regra universal:** Sempre gerar o prompt expandido em **inglês**. Manter o prompt expandido entre 50–120 palavras. Incluir sempre: sujeito principal, iluminação, estilo fotográfico/artístico, câmera/lente (quando aplicável), mood/atmosfera.
    72→
    73→---
    74→
    75→## Os 5 Especialistas
    76→
    77→### 🎯 Anúncios
    78→**Quando usar:** Criativos para Meta Ads, Google Ads, produtos, serviços, clínicas, negócios locais.
    79→
    80→**Estrutura canônica:**
    81→`[produto/serviço] advertisement, [sujeito + ação], [iluminação: studio/rim/softbox], [câmera: Canon/Sony 85mm f/1.4], commercial photography style, [background: clean/white/gradient], [color grading: warm/cool/neutral], [emoção: trust/confident/welcoming], Meta Ads format`
    82→
    83→**Vocabulário:** studio lighting, rim light, commercial photography, shallow depth of field, trust-inspiring, clean background, product hero shot, brand colors
    84→
    85→**Evitar:** artsy, experimental, surreal, cluttered backgrounds, dark moody tones
    86→
    87→**Exemplo:**
    88→- Simples: "clínica odontológica sorriso"
    89→- Expandido: "Professional dental clinic advertisement, confident woman smiling with perfect white teeth, soft studio lighting with rim light, shallow depth of field, Canon EOS R5 85mm f/1.4, commercial photography style, clean white background, warm color grading, trust-inspiring composition, Meta Ads format"
    90→
    91→---
    92→
    93→### 🎨 Conteúdo Criativo
    94→**Quando usar:** Arte conceitual, posts de redes sociais com apelo estético, storytelling visual, marcas de moda/lifestyle.
    95→
    96→**Estrutura canônica:**
    97→`[conceito] conceptual art, [sujeito + contexto], [composição: bold/dynamic/layered], [estilo: editorial/National Geographic/fine art], [iluminação: golden hour/dramatic/cinematic], [mood: narrative/emotional/striking], [técnica: high contrast/color grading]`
    98→
    99→**Vocabulário:** conceptual art, editorial style, bold composition, visual narrative, dynamic lighting, color contrast, fine art photography, storytelling
   100→
   101→**Evitar:** genérico, stock photo look, plain backgrounds sem intenção
   102→
   103→**Exemplo:**
   104→- Simples: "mulher e natureza"
   105→- Expandido: "Editorial conceptual art, woman merging with lush tropical nature, bold color contrast, dynamic composition, National Geographic style, golden hour lighting, environmental storytelling, high contrast shadows, award-winning photography"
   106→
   107→---
   108→
   109→### 🌀 Psicodélico
   110→**Quando usar:** Arte generativa, covers musicais, conteúdo alternativo, eventos, marcas disruptivas.
   111→
   112→**Estrutura canônica:**

   210→
   211→```python
   212→#!/usr/bin/env python3
   213→"""
   214→Script one-shot: cria tabelas creative_folders e creative_history no Neon.
   215→Executar: PYTHONPATH=/root python3 scripts/migrar_criativos.py
   216→"""
   217→import sys
   218→sys.path.insert(0, '/root')
   219→from core.db import get_conn
   220→
   221→SQL = """
   222→CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS creative_folders (
   223→    id        SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
   224→    nome      VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
   225→    criado_em TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()
   226→);
   227→
   228→CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS creative_history (
   229→    id               SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
   230→    tipo             VARCHAR(10)  NOT NULL CHECK (tipo IN ('imagem','video')),
   231→    modo             VARCHAR(20)  NOT NULL,
   232→    modelo           VARCHAR(50)  NOT NULL,
   233→    prompt_original  TEXT         NOT NULL,
   234→    prompt_expandido TEXT         NOT NULL,
   235→    url_resultado    TEXT         NOT NULL,
   236→    folder_id        INTEGER      REFERENCES creative_folders(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
   237→    criado_em        TIMESTAMP    DEFAULT NOW()
   238→);
   239→
   240→CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_creative_history_tipo    ON creative_history(tipo);
   241→CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_creative_history_folder  ON creative_history(folder_id);
   242→CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_creative_history_criado  ON creative_history(criado_em DESC);
   243→"""
   244→
   245→if __name__ == "__main__":
   246→    conn = get_conn()
   247→    try:
   248→        cur = conn.cursor()
   249→        cur.execute(SQL)
   250→        conn.commit()
   251→        print("✓ Tabelas creative_folders e creative_history criadas com sucesso.")
   252→    except Exception as e:
   253→        print(f"✕ Erro: {e}")
   254→        sys.exit(1)
   255→    finally:
   256→        conn.close()
   257→```

   378→```python
   379→@app.route("/api/criativos/upload-imagem", methods=["POST"])
   380→@login_required
   381→def criativos_upload_imagem():
   382→    if "arquivo" not in request.files:
   383→        return jsonify({"error": "Campo 'arquivo' ausente"}), 400
   384→    arquivo = request.files["arquivo"]
   385→    file_bytes = arquivo.read()
   386→    mime = arquivo.content_type or "image/jpeg"
   387→    # base64 para análise via Claude
   388→    b64 = base64.b64encode(file_bytes).decode("utf-8")
   389→    # Upload para Replicate Files API para uso como URL em I2V
   390→    try:
   391→        headers = _replicate_headers()
   392→        headers.pop("Content-Type")  # multipart não usa Content-Type JSON
   393→        resp = requests.post(
   394→            f"{_REPLICATE_BASE}/files",
   395→            headers={"Authorization": headers["Authorization"]},
   396→            files={"content": (arquivo.filename or "upload", file_bytes, mime)},
   397→            timeout=30,
   398→        )
   399→        if not resp.ok:
   400→            return jsonify({"error": f"Replicate upload: {resp.text[:200]}"}), 500
   401→        url = resp.json().get("urls", {}).get("get") or resp.json().get("url", "")
   402→        return jsonify({"url": url, "base64": b64, "mime_type": mime, "ok": True})
   403→    except RuntimeError as e:
   404→        return jsonify({"error": str(e)}), 500
   405→    except Exception as e:
   406→        return jsonify({"error": str(e)}), 500
   407→```

   508→## Task 4: Backend — Geração de Imagem
   509→

   513→- [ ] **Step 1: Adicionar rota de geração de imagem**
   514→
   515→```python
   516→@app.route("/api/criativos/gerar-imagem", methods=["POST"])
   517→@login_required
   518→def criativos_gerar_imagem():
   519→    d = request.get_json() or {}
   520→    prompt  = (d.get("prompt_expandido") or "").strip()
   521→    modelo  = d.get("modelo", "flux-1.1-pro")
   522→    if not prompt:
   523→        return jsonify({"error": "prompt_expandido obrigatório"}), 400
   524→    if modelo not in _CRIATIVOS_MODELOS_IMAGEM:
   525→        return jsonify({"error": f"modelo inválido. Válidos: {list(_CRIATIVOS_MODELOS_IMAGEM)}"}), 400
   526→
   527→    slug = _CRIATIVOS_MODELOS_IMAGEM[modelo]
   528→    try:
   529→        headers = _replicate_headers()
   530→        headers["Prefer"] = "wait=60"
   531→        resp = requests.post(
   532→            f"{_REPLICATE_BASE}/models/{slug}/predictions",
   533→            headers=headers,
   534→            json={"input": {"prompt": prompt, "aspect_ratio": "4:5",
   535→                            "output_format": "webp", "output_quality": 90}},
   536→            timeout=90,
   537→        )
   538→        if not resp.ok:
   539→            return jsonify({"error": f"Replicate {resp.status_code}: {resp.text[:300]}"}), 500
   540→        pred = resp.json()
   541→        # Caminho síncrono (Prefer: wait)
   542→        if pred.get("status") == "succeeded":
   543→            out = pred.get("output")
   544→            url = out[0] if isinstance(out, list) else out
   545→            return jsonify({"url": url, "ok": True})
   546→        # Fallback polling (raro)
   547→        import time as _t
   548→        get_url = (pred.get("urls") or {}).get("get", "")
   549→        hdrs = {"Authorization": headers["Authorization"]}
   550→        for _ in range(20):
   551→            _t.sleep(3)
   552→            p = requests.get(get_url, headers=hdrs, timeout=15).json()
   553→            if p.get("status") == "succeeded":
   554→                out = p.get("output")
   555→                return jsonify({"url": (out[0] if isinstance(out, list) else out), "ok": True})
   556→            if p.get("status") == "failed":
   557→                return jsonify({"error": p.get("error", "Geração falhou")}), 500
   558→        return jsonify({"error": "Timeout na geração de imagem"}), 500
   559→    except RuntimeError as e:
   560→        return jsonify({"error": str(e)}), 500
   561→    except Exception as e:
   562→        return jsonify({"error": str(e)}), 500
   563→```

   587→- [ ] **Step 1: Adicionar rota de geração de vídeo (inicia)**
   588→
   589→```python
   590→@app.route("/api/criativos/gerar-video", methods=["POST"])
   591→@login_required
   592→def criativos_gerar_video():
   593→    d = request.get_json() or {}
   594→    prompt     = (d.get("prompt_expandido") or "").strip()
   595→    modelo     = d.get("modelo", "wan-t2v-fast")
   596→    imagem_url = d.get("imagem_url")
   597→    if not prompt:
   598→        return jsonify({"error": "prompt_expandido obrigatório"}), 400
   599→    if modelo not in _CRIATIVOS_MODELOS_VIDEO:
   600→        return jsonify({"error": f"modelo inválido. Válidos: {list(_CRIATIVOS_MODELOS_VIDEO)}"}), 400
   601→
   602→    slug, tipo = _CRIATIVOS_MODELOS_VIDEO[modelo]
   603→    if tipo == "i2v" and not imagem_url:
   604→        return jsonify({"error": "imagem_url obrigatório para modelos I2V"}), 400
   605→
   606→    input_payload = {"prompt": prompt}
   607→    if tipo == "i2v":
   608→        input_payload["image"] = imagem_url
   609→
   610→    try:
   611→        headers = _replicate_headers()
   612→        resp = requests.post(
   613→            f"{_REPLICATE_BASE}/models/{slug}/predictions",
   614→            headers=headers,
   615→            json={"input": input_payload},
   616→            timeout=30,
   617→        )
   618→        if not resp.ok:
   619→            return jsonify({"error": f"Replicate {resp.status_code}: {resp.text[:300]}"}), 500
   620→        pred = resp.json()
   621→        return jsonify({"prediction_id": pred.get("id"), "ok": True})
   622→    except RuntimeError as e:
   623→        return jsonify({"error": str(e)}), 500
   624→    except Exception as e:
   625→        return jsonify({"error": str(e)}), 500
   626→```
   627→
   628→- [ ] **Step 2: Adicionar rota de status (polling do frontend)**
   629→
   630→```python
   631→@app.route("/api/criativos/status/<prediction_id>")
   632→@login_required
   633→def criativos_status(prediction_id):
   634→    try:
   635→        headers = _replicate_headers()
   636→        resp = requests.get(
   637→            f"{_REPLICATE_BASE}/predictions/{prediction_id}",
   638→            headers={"Authorization": headers["Authorization"]},
   639→            timeout=15,
   640→        )
   641→        if not resp.ok:
   642→            return jsonify({"status": "failed", "error": resp.text[:200]}), 500
   643→        pred = resp.json()
   644→        status = pred.get("status", "starting")
   645→        url = None
   646→        if status == "succeeded":
   647→            out = pred.get("output")
   648→            url = out[0] if isinstance(out, list) else out
   649→        return jsonify({"status": status, "url": url, "error": pred.get("error")})
   650→    except RuntimeError as e:
   651→        return jsonify({"status": "failed", "error": str(e)}), 500
   652→    except Exception as e:
   653→        return jsonify({"status": "failed", "error": str(e)}), 500
   654→```

   736→- [ ] **Step 2: Adicionar rotas de histórico**
   737→
   738→```python
   739→@app.route("/api/criativos/historico", methods=["GET"])
   740→@login_required
   741→def criativos_listar_historico():
   742→    folder_id = request.args.get("folder_id")
   743→    tipo      = request.args.get("tipo")
   744→    page      = max(1, int(request.args.get("page", 1)))
   745→    limit     = min(50, max(1, int(request.args.get("limit", 20))))
   746→    offset    = (page - 1) * limit
   747→    where, params = [], []
   748→    if folder_id:
   749→        where.append("folder_id = %s"); params.append(int(folder_id))
   750→    if tipo in ("imagem", "video"):
   751→        where.append("tipo = %s"); params.append(tipo)
   752→    where_sql = ("WHERE " + " AND ".join(where)) if where else ""
   753→    try:
   754→        conn = _get_db(); cur = conn.cursor()
   755→        cur.execute(f"SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM creative_history {where_sql}", params)
   756→        total = cur.fetchone()["total"]
   757→        cur.execute(
   758→            f"SELECT id, tipo, modo, modelo, prompt_original, prompt_expandido, url_resultado, folder_id, criado_em "
   759→            f"FROM creative_history {where_sql} ORDER BY criado_em DESC LIMIT %s OFFSET %s",
   760→            params + [limit, offset]
   761→        )
   762→        items = [dict(r) for r in cur.fetchall()]; conn.close()
   763→        import math
   764→        return jsonify({"items": items, "total": total, "page": page, "pages": math.ceil(total/limit) if total else 1})
   765→    except Exception as e:
   766→        return jsonify({"error": str(e)}), 500

content.text:
I have read both files in full. Here is my review:

---

❌ Issues Found

**1. Route count mismatch — plan claims 12 routes, spec says 10**
The plan File Map says "12 novas rotas" but the spec says "10 novas rotas". Counting both: upload-imagem, expandir-prompt, analisar-referencia, gerar-imagem, gerar-video, status/<id>, historico GET, historico POST, historico/<id> DELETE, historico/<id>/pasta PATCH, pastas GET, pastas POST, pastas/<id> DELETE = 13 actual routes. The spec lists 10. Both documents have an inconsistent count that will confuse the implementer. The plan should enumerate all routes explicitly with a count that matches reality.

**2. `_get_db()` used in Task 6 but never defined in the plan**
Tasks 6 (pastas and historico routes) call `_get_db()` and `conn.cursor()` expecting dict-like rows (`cur.fetchone()["id"]`). The plan never shows where `_get_db()` comes from, what it returns, or whether `app.py` already has it. If it doesn't exist or returns a plain psycopg2 cursor (not `RealDictCursor`), `cur.fetchone()["id"]` will raise a `TypeError`. The plan must either show the `_get_db()` definition or explicitly state "use the existing `_get_db()` helper at line X" with a check step.

**3. `_anthropic_client()` used in Task 3 but never defined in the plan**
Steps 3 and 4 of Task 3 call `_anthropic_client()` without ever defining it. Same problem as above — the plan must either show the function or point to the existing line in `app.py`.

**4. Task 9 Step 1 leaves stub functions — Task 10 says "replace stubs" but gives no exact find/replace anchor**
Task 10 says "Substituir as funções stub `bindUpload`, `bindPromptActions`, `bindGerarBtn`" but the stubs in Task 9 are inside a `})();` IIFE closure. The plan gives no exact `old_string` / anchor for the replacement, and no command to do it. An implementer using the Edit tool will need the exact old function text. This is a placeholder-level instruction, not a bite-sized step with exact commands.

**5. Same problem for Task 11 — "replace remaining stubs" has no exact anchor**
Task 11 says "Substituir os stubs restantes: `bindResultadoAcoes`, `bindAbas`, `bindHistoricoEvents`, `carregarPastas`, `carregarHistorico`" — same issue. No exact old text is provided, and all five stubs are empty `function foo() {}` lines that look identical in structure. The plan must include the exact old stub block to replace, or use an append-after-line instruction.

**6. Task 11 Step numbering skips Step 4**
Steps go: 1, 2, 3, then jump to **Step 5** (smoke test) and **Step 6** (commit). Step 4 is missing. Minor but breaks checkbox tracking for an agentic worker.

**7. "Mover de pasta" action in the history card is missing from the JS implementation**
The spec explicitly requires per-card "Mover de pasta" action. The CSS has `.cri-hist-btn` for it, but Task 11's `carregarHistorico` HTML template only renders Download and Delete buttons. There is no button for moving a card to a different folder and no call to `PATCH /api/criativos/historico/<id>/pasta`. This feature is in the spec but absent from the plan's JS.

**8. Pasta deletion modal (with criativo count) is missing from the frontend**
The spec says: "Deletar pasta com criativos: modal de confirmação informando quantos criativos serão desvinculados." The backend correctly returns `criativos_desvinculados` in the DELETE response, but no task adds a modal or even a `confirm()` dialog for folder deletion in the frontend. There is no "delete folder" button in the HTML or any JS handler for it — the feature is completely absent from the plan.

**9. `import math` inside a route function (Task 6 Step 2) is non-idiomatic and fragile**
The plan places `import math` inside the `criativos_listar_historico` function body. While valid Python, it is inconsistent with Flask conventions and will trigger a linter warning. It should be moved to the top-level imports in the "Step 1: constants" block.

**10. `import time as _t` inside a route function (Task 4)**
Same issue — `import time as _t` is placed inside the fallback polling loop inside `criativos_gerar_imagem`. Should be at module level.

**11. Task 8 Step 3 — no verification that the CSS/JS `<link>` and `<script>` tags are placed in the right locations**
The instruction says "No `<head>`, após o `anuncios.css`" and "Antes do `</body>`, após o `anuncios.js`" — but gives no grep command to confirm these anchor tags exist in `dashboard.html`, and no verification step that the new tags were actually inserted. The verification step (Step 4) only checks HTTP 200 on `/login`, which would pass even if the tags were missing.

**12. Skill commit uses `git add -f ~/.claude/skills/...` — path may not be inside the repo**
`~/.claude/skills/` is almost certainly outside `/root` (the git repo). `git add -f` on a path outside the repo working tree will fail with "fatal: pathspec ... is outside repository". The plan should either note this is not tracked in the repo, or use a different strategy (e.g., document it as a manual step with no commit).

---

**Summary:** 12 specific issues. The most blocking are #2, #3 (missing helper definitions), #4/#5 (stub replacement with no anchors), #7 (missing "mover pasta" JS), and #8 (missing folder deletion UI). Fix these before execution.

5. Tests included where applicable
6. Commit steps present
7. No missing routes, DB tables, or frontend features from spec
8. Task dependencies are logically ordered
9. The plan is implementable without needing to re-read the spec

Reply with either:
- ✅ Approved — brief summary of what looks good
- ❌ Issues Found — numbered list of specific problems to fix

Be precise and actionable. Read both files before responding.

# Fábrica de Criativos v2 — Implementation Plan

> **For agentic workers:** REQUIRED SUB-SKILL: Use superpowers:subagent-driven-development (recommended) or superpowers:executing-plans to implement this plan task-by-task. Steps use checkbox (`- [ ]`) syntax for tracking.

**Goal:** Substituir a Fábrica de Criativos atual por versão completa com geração de imagem/vídeo (11 modelos Replicate), 5 especialistas de prompt via Claude, upload de referência, histórico paginado com pastas, e skill global do Claude Code.

**Architecture:** Backend Flask com 12 novas rotas em `app.py`; geração de vídeo assíncrona com polling via `GET /status/<prediction_id>`; frontend Split View (config esquerda / resultado direita) em IIFE Vanilla JS; banco Neon com 2 novas tabelas; skill Markdown com 5 engenheiros de prompt especializados.

**Tech Stack:** Python/Flask, psycopg2 (Neon PostgreSQL), Replicate REST API (sem SDK), Anthropic claude-sonnet-4-6, Vanilla JS (IIFE), CSS Glassmorphism (padrão Jake OS)

**Spec:** `docs/superpowers/specs/2026-03-21-fabrica-de-criativos-design.md`

---

## File Map

| Arquivo | Ação | Responsabilidade |
|---|---|---|
| `scripts/migrar_criativos.py` | Criar | Migration one-shot: tabelas + índices |
| `jake_desktop/app.py` | Modificar | 12 novas rotas `/api/criativos/*` |

```markdown
---
name: fabrica-de-criativos
description: Use when generating AI images or videos for ad creatives, needing prompt engineering for Replicate models, or working on the Jake OS Fábrica de Criativos feature. Provides 5 specialized prompt engineers (Anúncios, Criativo, Psicodélico, Pessoas, Cena) and Replicate model reference.
---

# Fábrica de Criativos — Prompt Engineering Skill

## Overview

5 engenheiros de prompt especializados para geração de criativos com IA. Cada especialista expande um prompt simples em português para um prompt técnico profissional em inglês, otimizado para o tipo de criativo.

**Regra universal:** Sempre gerar o prompt expandido em **inglês**. Manter o prompt expandido entre 50–120 palavras. Incluir sempre: sujeito principal, iluminação, estilo fotográfico/artístico, câmera/lente (quando aplicável), mood/atmosfera.

---

## Os 5 Especialistas

### 🎯 Anúncios
**Quando usar:** Criativos para Meta Ads, Google Ads, produtos, serviços, clínicas, negócios locais.

**Estrutura canônica:**
`[produto/serviço] advertisement, [sujeito + ação], [iluminação: studio/rim/softbox], [câmera: Canon/Sony 85mm f/1.4], commercial photography style, [background: clean/white/gradient], [color grading: warm/cool/neutral], [emoção: trust/confident/welcoming], Meta Ads format`

**Vocabulário:** studio lighting, rim light, commercial photography, shallow depth of field, trust-inspiring, clean background, product hero shot, brand colors

**Evitar:** artsy, experimental, surreal, cluttered backgrounds, dark moody tones

**Exemplo:**
- Simples: "clínica odontológica sorriso"
- Expandido: "Professional dental clinic advertisement, confident woman smiling with perfect white teeth, soft studio lighting with rim light, shallow depth of field, Canon EOS R5 85mm f/1.4, commercial photography style, clean white background, warm color grading, trust-inspiring composition, Meta Ads format"

---

### 🎨 Conteúdo Criativo
**Quando usar:** Arte conceitual, posts de redes sociais com apelo estético, storytelling visual, marcas de moda/lifestyle.

**Estrutura canônica:**
`[conceito] conceptual art, [sujeito + contexto], [composição: bold/dynamic/layered], [estilo: editorial/National Geographic/fine art], [iluminação: golden hour/dramatic/cinematic], [mood: narrative/emotional/striking], [técnica: high contrast/color grading]`

**Vocabulário:** conceptual art, editorial style, bold composition, visual narrative, dynamic lighting, color contrast, fine art photography, storytelling

#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
Script one-shot: cria tabelas creative_folders e creative_history no Neon.
Executar: PYTHONPATH=/root python3 scripts/migrar_criativos.py
"""
import sys
sys.path.insert(0, '/root')
from core.db import get_conn

SQL = """
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS creative_folders (
    id        SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    nome      VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
    criado_em TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS creative_history (
    id               SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    tipo             VARCHAR(10)  NOT NULL CHECK (tipo IN ('imagem','video')),
    modo             VARCHAR(20)  NOT NULL,
    modelo           VARCHAR(50)  NOT NULL,
    prompt_original  TEXT         NOT NULL,
    prompt_expandido TEXT         NOT NULL,

    folder_id        INTEGER      REFERENCES creative_folders(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
    criado_em        TIMESTAMP    DEFAULT NOW()
);

CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_creative_history_tipo    ON creative_history(tipo);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_creative_history_folder  ON creative_history(folder_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_creative_history_criado  ON creative_history(criado_em DESC);
"""

if __name__ == "__main__":
    conn = get_conn()
    try:
        cur = conn.cursor()
        cur.execute(SQL)
        conn.commit()
        print("✓ Tabelas creative_folders e creative_history criadas com sucesso.")
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"✕ Erro: {e}")
        sys.exit(1)
    finally:
        conn.close()
```

def _replicate_headers():
    token = os.getenv("REPLICATE_API_TOKEN", "").strip()
    if not token:
        raise RuntimeError("REPLICATE_API_TOKEN não configurado no .env")

```python
@app.route("/api/criativos/upload-imagem", methods=["POST"])
@login_required
def criativos_upload_imagem():
    if "arquivo" not in request.files:
        return jsonify({"error": "Campo 'arquivo' ausente"}), 400
    arquivo = request.files["arquivo"]
    file_bytes = arquivo.read()
    mime = arquivo.content_type or "image/jpeg"
    # base64 para análise via Claude
    b64 = base64.b64encode(file_bytes).decode("utf-8")
    # Upload para Replicate Files API para uso como URL em I2V
    try:
        headers = _replicate_headers()
        headers.pop("Content-Type")  # multipart não usa Content-Type JSON
        resp = requests.post(
            f"{_REPLICATE_BASE}/files",
            headers={"Authorization": headers["Authorization"]},
            files={"content": (arquivo.filename or "upload", file_bytes, mime)},
            timeout=30,
        )
        if not resp.ok:
            return jsonify({"error": f"Replicate upload: {resp.text[:200]}"}), 500
        url = resp.json().get("urls", {}).get("get") or resp.json().get("url", "")
        return jsonify({"url": url, "base64": b64, "mime_type": mime, "ok": True})
    except RuntimeError as e:
        return jsonify({"error": str(e)}), 500
    except Exception as e:
        return jsonify({"error": str(e)}), 500
```

- [ ] **Step 3: Adicionar rota de expandir prompt**

```python
@app.route("/api/criativos/expandir-prompt", methods=["POST"])
@login_required
def criativos_expandir_prompt():
    d = request.get_json() or {}
    prompt = (d.get("prompt") or "").strip()
    modo   = d.get("modo", "criativo")
    tipo   = d.get("tipo", "imagem")
    if not prompt:
        return jsonify({"error": "Campo 'prompt' obrigatório"}), 400
    if modo not in _CRIATIVOS_MODOS:
        return jsonify({"error": f"modo inválido. Válidos: {list(_CRIATIVOS_MODOS)}"}), 400

    client = _anthropic_client()
    if not client:
        return jsonify({"error": "ANTHROPIC_API_KEY não configurada"}), 500

    system = _CRIATIVOS_SYSTEM_PROMPTS[modo]
    tipo_hint = " Optimize for motion, camera movement, and temporal consistency." if tipo == "video" else ""
    try:
        msg = client.messages.create(
            model="claude-sonnet-4-6",
            max_tokens=200,
            system=system + tipo_hint,
            messages=[{"role": "user", "content": f"Expand this prompt: {prompt}"}],
        )
        return jsonify({"prompt_expandido": msg.content[0].text.strip()})
    except Exception as e:
        return jsonify({"error": str(e)}), 500
```

# Fábrica de Criativos v2 — Implementation Plan

> **For agentic workers:** REQUIRED SUB-SKILL: Use superpowers:subagent-driven-development (recommended) or superpowers:executing-plans to implement this plan task-by-task. Steps use checkbox (`- [ ]`) syntax for tracking.

**Goal:** Substituir a Fábrica de Criativos atual por versão completa com geração de imagem/vídeo (11 modelos Replicate), 5 especialistas de prompt via Claude, upload de referência, histórico paginado com pastas, e skill global do Claude Code.

**Architecture:** Backend Flask com 12 novas rotas em `app.py`; geração de vídeo assíncrona com polling via `GET /status/<prediction_id>`; frontend Split View (config esquerda / resultado direita) em IIFE Vanilla JS; banco Neon com 2 novas tabelas; skill Markdown com 5 engenheiros de prompt especializados.

**Tech Stack:** Python/Flask, psycopg2 (Neon PostgreSQL), Replicate REST API (sem SDK), Anthropic claude-sonnet-4-6, Vanilla JS (IIFE), CSS Glassmorphism (padrão Jake OS)

**Spec:** `docs/superpowers/specs/2026-03-21-fabrica-de-criativos-design.md`

```markdown
---
name: fabrica-de-criativos
description: Use when generating AI images or videos for ad creatives, needing prompt engineering for Replicate models, or working on the Jake OS Fábrica de Criativos feature. Provides 5 specialized prompt engineers (Anúncios, Criativo, Psicodélico, Pessoas, Cena) and Replicate model reference.
---

# Fábrica de Criativos — Prompt Engineering Skill

## Overview

5 engenheiros de prompt especializados para geração de criativos com IA. Cada especialista expande um prompt simples em português para um prompt técnico profissional em inglês, otimizado para o tipo de criativo.

**Regra universal:** Sempre gerar o prompt expandido em **inglês**. Manter o prompt expandido entre 50–120 palavras. Incluir sempre: sujeito principal, iluminação, estilo fotográfico/artístico, câmera/lente (quando aplicável), mood/atmosfera.

---

## Os 5 Especialistas

### 🎯 Anúncios
**Quando usar:** Criativos para Meta Ads, Google Ads, produtos, serviços, clínicas, negócios locais.

**Estrutura canônica:**
`[produto/serviço] advertisement, [sujeito + ação], [iluminação: studio/rim/softbox], [câmera: Canon/Sony 85mm f/1.4], commercial photography style, [background: clean/white/gradient], [color grading: warm/cool/neutral], [emoção: trust/confident/welcoming], Meta Ads format`

**Vocabulário:** studio lighting, rim light, commercial photography, shallow depth of field, trust-inspiring, clean background, product hero shot, brand colors

**Evitar:** artsy, experimental, surreal, cluttered backgrounds, dark moody tones

**Exemplo:**
- Simples: "clínica odontológica sorriso"
- Expandido: "Professional dental clinic advertisement, confident woman smiling with perfect white teeth, soft studio lighting with rim light, shallow depth of field, Canon EOS R5 85mm f/1.4, commercial photography style, clean white background, warm color grading, trust-inspiring composition, Meta Ads format"

---

### 🎨 Conteúdo Criativo
**Quando usar:** Arte conceitual, posts de redes sociais com apelo estético, storytelling visual, marcas de moda/lifestyle.

**Estrutura canônica:**
`[conceito] conceptual art, [sujeito + contexto], [composição: bold/dynamic/layered], [estilo: editorial/National Geographic/fine art], [iluminação: golden hour/dramatic/cinematic], [mood: narrative/emotional/striking], [técnica: high contrast/color grading]`

**Vocabulário:** conceptual art, editorial style, bold composition, visual narrative, dynamic lighting, color contrast, fine art photography, storytelling

**Evitar:** genérico, stock photo look, plain backgrounds sem intenção

**Exemplo:**
- Simples: "mulher e natureza"
- Expandido: "Editorial conceptual art, woman merging with lush tropical nature, bold color contrast, dynamic composition, National Geographic style, golden hour lighting, environmental storytelling, high contrast shadows, award-winning photography"

---

### 🌀 Psicodélico
**Quando usar:** Arte generativa, covers musicais, conteúdo alternativo, eventos, marcas disruptivas.

**Estrutura canônica:**
`psychedelic [tema], [geometria: fractal/kaleidoscope/spiral], [paleta: neon/vibrant/cosmic], [referência: DMT-inspired/surrealist/dreamscape], ultra-detailed, 8K resolution, [técnica: liquid geometry/morphing/infinite recursion]`

**Vocabulário:** psychedelic, fractal geometry, neon colors, surrealist, kaleidoscope, liquid geometry, cosmic, DMT-inspired, interdimensional, crystalline

**Evitar:** fotorrealismo, tons apagados, composição convencional

**Exemplo:**
- Simples: "portal dimensional"
- Expandido: "Psychedelic dimensional portal, fractal geometry spiraling into infinite cosmos, neon cyan and magenta hues, liquid geometry morphing, DMT-inspired visuals, ultra-detailed, 8K resolution, surrealist dreamscape, kaleidoscope symmetry, cosmic interdimensional gateway"

---

### 👤 Pessoas Realistas
**Quando usar:** Retratos, personas de cliente, modelos para anúncios, conteúdo com pessoas.

**Estrutura canônica:**
`Hyperrealistic portrait, [sujeito: idade/gênero/etnia/expressão], [iluminação: Rembrandt/natural window/golden hour], skin texture with subsurface scattering, [câmera: Canon EOS R5 85mm f/1.2], shallow depth of field, [contexto/roupa], [mood: candid/professional/authentic]`

**Vocabulário:** hyperrealistic, skin texture, subsurface scattering, natural light, bokeh, candid, Rembrandt lighting, photojournalism, authentic expression, pore detail

**Evitar:** AI-looking skin, plastic textures, symmetry perfeita demais, olhos artificiais

**Exemplo:**
- Simples: "homem de negócios confiante"
- Expandido: "Hyperrealistic portrait, confident businessman mid-40s, natural window light with Rembrandt lighting, skin texture with subsurface scattering, Canon EOS R5 85mm f/1.2, shallow depth of field, professional business attire, authentic expression, photojournalism style, 8K resolution"

---

### 🌆 Cena/Ambiente
**Quando usar:** Paisagens urbanas, natureza, arquitetura, cenários para fundo de anúncios.

**Estrutura canônica:**
`Cinematic [tipo de cena], [horário/luz: golden hour/blue hour/overcast], [técnica de composição: leading lines/rule of thirds/symmetry], [efeito: volumetric light/atmospheric haze/long exposure], wide angle [mm], [referência: award-winning landscape/National Geographic], [mood: epic/serene/dramatic]`

**Vocabulário:** wide angle, leading lines, atmospheric perspective, golden hour, volumetric light, establishing shot, rule of thirds, long exposure, atmospheric haze

**Evitar:** composições planas, luz plana sem drama, perspectiva de smartphone

**Exemplo:**
- Simples: "cidade no pôr do sol"
- Expandido: "Cinematic cityscape at golden hour, dramatic volumetric light rays, leading lines from architecture into infinite horizon, atmospheric haze, wide angle 16mm, rule of thirds composition, long exposure light trails, urban landscape photography, award-winning composition, National Geographic style"

---

## Replicate — Model IDs e Parâmetros

### Imagem

| `flux-1.1-pro` | `black-forest-labs/flux-1.1-pro` | Anúncios, Pessoas | 4:5 |
| `flux-dev` | `black-forest-labs/flux-dev` | Criativo, qualidade alta | 4:5 |
| `recraft-v3` | `recraft-ai/recraft-v3` | Design, UI, vetorial | 1:1 |
| `ideogram-v3-turbo` | `ideogram-ai/ideogram-v3-turbo` | Texto em imagem, logos | 1:1 |
| `imagen-4` | `google/imagen-4` | Fotorrealismo máximo | 4:5 |

**Endpoint padrão imagem:** `POST https://api.replicate.com/v1/models/{slug}/predictions`

## Task 2: Migration — Tabelas no Neon

**Files:**
- Create: `scripts/migrar_criativos.py`

- [ ] **Step 1: Criar script de migração**

```python
#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
Script one-shot: cria tabelas creative_folders e creative_history no Neon.
Executar: PYTHONPATH=/root python3 scripts/migrar_criativos.py
"""
import sys
sys.path.insert(0, '/root')
from core.db import get_conn

SQL = """
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS creative_folders (
    id        SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    nome      VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
    criado_em TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS creative_history (
    id               SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    tipo             VARCHAR(10)  NOT NULL CHECK (tipo IN ('imagem','video')),
    modo             VARCHAR(20)  NOT NULL,
    modelo           VARCHAR(50)  NOT NULL,
    prompt_original  TEXT         NOT NULL,
    prompt_expandido TEXT         NOT NULL,
    url_resultado    TEXT         NOT NULL,
    folder_id        INTEGER      REFERENCES creative_folders(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
    criado_em        TIMESTAMP    DEFAULT NOW()
);

CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_creative_history_tipo    ON creative_history(tipo);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_creative_history_folder  ON creative_history(folder_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_creative_history_criado  ON creative_history(criado_em DESC);
"""

if __name__ == "__main__":
    conn = get_conn()
    try:
        cur = conn.cursor()
        cur.execute(SQL)
        conn.commit()
        print("✓ Tabelas creative_folders e creative_history criadas com sucesso.")
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"✕ Erro: {e}")
        sys.exit(1)
    finally:
        conn.close()
```

- [ ] **Step 2: Executar migração**

```bash
PYTHONPATH=/root /root/venv/bin/python3 /root/scripts/migrar_criativos.py
```

Expected: `✓ Tabelas creative_folders e creative_history criadas com sucesso.`

- [ ] **Step 3: Verificar tabelas**

```bash
PYTHONPATH=/root /root/venv/bin/python3 -c "
from core.db import get_conn
conn = get_conn()
cur = conn.cursor()
cur.execute(\"SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_name IN ('creative_folders','creative_history')\")
print(cur.fetchall())
conn.close()
"
```

Expected: `[('creative_folders',), ('creative_history',)]`

- [ ] **Step 4: Commit**

```bash
git add scripts/migrar_criativos.py
git commit -m "feat: migration — tabelas creative_folders e creative_history"
```

    "wan-i2v-fast":  ("wavespeedai/wan-2.2-i2v-480p", "i2v"),
}

_CRIATIVOS_SYSTEM_PROMPTS = {
    "anuncios": (
        "You are an expert commercial photographer and ad creative director specializing in Meta Ads and Google Ads. "

_REPLICATE_BASE = "https://api.replicate.com/v1"


def _replicate_headers():
    token = os.getenv("REPLICATE_API_TOKEN", "").strip()
    if not token:
        raise RuntimeError("REPLICATE_API_TOKEN não configurado no .env")
    return {"Authorization": f"Bearer {token}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}
```

Logo após as constantes acima:

```python
@app.route("/api/criativos/upload-imagem", methods=["POST"])
@login_required
def criativos_upload_imagem():
    if "arquivo" not in request.files:
        return jsonify({"error": "Campo 'arquivo' ausente"}), 400
    arquivo = request.files["arquivo"]
    file_bytes = arquivo.read()
    mime = arquivo.content_type or "image/jpeg"
    # base64 para análise via Claude
    b64 = base64.b64encode(file_bytes).decode("utf-8")
    # Upload para Replicate Files API para uso como URL em I2V
    try:
        headers = _replicate_headers()
        headers.pop("Content-Type")  # multipart não usa Content-Type JSON
        resp = requests.post(
            f"{_REPLICATE_BASE}/files",
            headers={"Authorization": headers["Authorization"]},
            files={"content": (arquivo.filename or "upload", file_bytes, mime)},
            timeout=30,
        )
        if not resp.ok:
            return jsonify({"error": f"Replicate upload: {resp.text[:200]}"}), 500
        url = resp.json().get("urls", {}).get("get") or resp.json().get("url", "")
        return jsonify({"url": url, "base64": b64, "mime_type": mime, "ok": True})
    except RuntimeError as e:
        return jsonify({"error": str(e)}), 500
    except Exception as e:
        return jsonify({"error": str(e)}), 500
```

```python
@app.route("/api/criativos/expandir-prompt", methods=["POST"])
@login_required
def criativos_expandir_prompt():
    d = request.get_json() or {}
    prompt = (d.get("prompt") or "").strip()
    modo   = d.get("modo", "criativo")
    tipo   = d.get("tipo", "imagem")
    if not prompt:
        return jsonify({"error": "Campo 'prompt' obrigatório"}), 400
    if modo not in _CRIATIVOS_MODOS:
        return jsonify({"error": f"modo inválido. Válidos: {list(_CRIATIVOS_MODOS)}"}), 400

    client = _anthropic_client()
    if not client:
        return jsonify({"error": "ANTHROPIC_API_KEY não configurada"}), 500

    system = _CRIATIVOS_SYSTEM_PROMPTS[modo]
    tipo_hint = " Optimize for motion, camera movement, and temporal consistency." if tipo == "video" else ""
    try:
        msg = client.messages.create(
            model="claude-sonnet-4-6",
            max_tokens=200,
            system=system + tipo_hint,
            messages=[{"role": "user", "content": f"Expand this prompt: {prompt}"}],
        )
        return jsonify({"prompt_expandido": msg.content[0].text.strip()})
    except Exception as e:
        return jsonify({"error": str(e)}), 500
```

```python
@app.route("/api/criativos/analisar-referencia", methods=["POST"])
@login_required
def criativos_analisar_referencia():
    d = request.get_json() or {}
    b64  = d.get("imagem_base64", "")
    mime = d.get("mime_type", "image/jpeg")
    if not b64:
        return jsonify({"error": "imagem_base64 obrigatório"}), 400

    client = _anthropic_client()
    if not client:
        return jsonify({"error": "ANTHROPIC_API_KEY não configurada"}), 500

    system = (
        "You are an expert visual analyst and prompt engineer. "
        "Analyze the image and return ONLY valid JSON with two fields: "
        "'prompt_sugerido' (English prompt 50-120 words to recreate this visual style) and "
        "'modo_sugerido' (one of: anuncios, criativo, psicodelico, pessoas, cena). "
        "No markdown, no explanation, just the JSON object."
    )
    try:
        msg = client.messages.create(
            model="claude-sonnet-4-6",
            max_tokens=300,
            system=system,
            messages=[{"role": "user", "content": [
                {"type": "image", "source": {"type": "base64", "media_type": mime, "data": b64}},
                {"type": "text",  "text": "Analyze this image and return the JSON."},
            ]}],
        )
        raw = msg.content[0].text.strip()
        if "```" in raw:
            raw = raw.split("```")[1]
            if raw.startswith("json\n"):
                raw = raw[5:]
        result = json.loads(raw)
        # Validar modo_sugerido
        if result.get("modo_sugerido") not in _CRIATIVOS_MODOS:
            result["modo_sugerido"] = "criativo"
        return jsonify(result)
    except json.JSONDecodeError:
        return jsonify({"error": "IA retornou formato inválido"}), 500
    except Exception as e:
        return jsonify({"error": str(e)}), 500
```

```python
@app.route("/api/criativos/gerar-imagem", methods=["POST"])
@login_required
def criativos_gerar_imagem():
    d = request.get_json() or {}
    prompt  = (d.get("prompt_expandido") or "").strip()
    modelo  = d.get("modelo", "flux-1.1-pro")
    if not prompt:
        return jsonify({"error": "prompt_expandido obrigatório"}), 400
    if modelo not in _CRIATIVOS_MODELOS_IMAGEM:
        return jsonify({"error": f"modelo inválido. Válidos: {list(_CRIATIVOS_MODELOS_IMAGEM)}"}), 400

    slug = _CRIATIVOS_MODELOS_IMAGEM[modelo]
    try:
        headers = _replicate_headers()
        headers["Prefer"] = "wait=60"
        resp = requests.post(
            f"{_REPLICATE_BASE}/models/{slug}/predictions",
            headers=headers,
            json={"input": {"prompt": prompt, "aspect_ratio": "4:5",
                            "output_format": "webp", "output_quality": 90}},
            timeout=90,
        )
        if not resp.ok:
            return jsonify({"error": f"Replicate {resp.status_code}: {resp.text[:300]}"}), 500
        pred = resp.json()
        # Caminho síncrono (Prefer: wait)
        if pred.get("status") == "succeeded":
            out = pred.get("output")
            url = out[0] if isinstance(out, list) else out
            return jsonify({"url": url, "ok": True})
        # Fallback polling (raro)
        import time as _t
        get_url = (pred.get("urls") or {}).get("get", "")
        hdrs = {"Authorization": headers["Authorization"]}
        for _ in range(20):
            _t.sleep(3)
            p = requests.get(get_url, headers=hdrs, timeout=15).json()
            if p.get("status") == "succeeded":
                out = p.get("output")
                return jsonify({"url": (out[0] if isinstance(out, list) else out), "ok": True})
            if p.get("status") == "failed":
                return jsonify({"error": p.get("error", "Geração falhou")}), 500
        return jsonify({"error": "Timeout na geração de imagem"}), 500
    except RuntimeError as e:
        return jsonify({"error": str(e)}), 500
    except Exception as e:
        return jsonify({"error": str(e)}), 500
```

@app.route("/api/criativos/gerar-video", methods=["POST"])
@login_required
def criativos_gerar_video():
    d = request.get_json() or {}
    prompt     = (d.get("prompt_expandido") or "").strip()
    modelo     = d.get("modelo", "wan-t2v-fast")
    imagem_url = d.get("imagem_url")
    if not prompt:
        return jsonify({"error": "prompt_expandido obrigatório"}), 400
    if modelo not in _CRIATIVOS_MODELOS_VIDEO:
        return jsonify({"error": f"modelo inválido. Válidos: {list(_CRIATIVOS_MODELOS_VIDEO)}"}), 400

    slug, tipo = _CRIATIVOS_MODELOS_VIDEO[modelo]
    if tipo == "i2v" and not imagem_url:
        return jsonify({"error": "imagem_url obrigatório para modelos I2V"}), 400

    input_payload = {"prompt": prompt}
    if tipo == "i2v":
        input_payload["image"] = imagem_url

    try:
        headers = _replicate_headers()
        resp = requests.post(
            f"{_REPLICATE_BASE}/models/{slug}/predictions",
            headers=headers,
            json={"input": input_payload},
            timeout=30,
        )
        if not resp.ok:
            return jsonify({"error": f"Replicate {resp.status_code}: {resp.text[:300]}"}), 500
        pred = resp.json()
        return jsonify({"prediction_id": pred.get("id"), "ok": True})
    except RuntimeError as e:
        return jsonify({"error": str(e)}), 500
    except Exception as e:
        return jsonify({"error": str(e)}), 500
```

@app.route("/api/criativos/status/<prediction_id>")
@login_required
def criativos_status(prediction_id):
    try:
        headers = _replicate_headers()
        resp = requests.get(
            f"{_REPLICATE_BASE}/predictions/{prediction_id}",
            headers={"Authorization": headers["Authorization"]},
            timeout=15,
        )
        if not resp.ok:
            return jsonify({"status": "failed", "error": resp.text[:200]}), 500
        pred = resp.json()
        status = pred.get("status", "starting")
        url = None
        if status == "succeeded":
            out = pred.get("output")
            url = out[0] if isinstance(out, list) else out
        return jsonify({"status": status, "url": url, "error": pred.get("error")})
    except RuntimeError as e:
        return jsonify({"status": "failed", "error": str(e)}), 500
    except Exception as e:
        return jsonify({"status": "failed", "error": str(e)}), 500
```

@app.route("/api/criativos/historico", methods=["GET"])
@login_required
def criativos_listar_historico():
    folder_id = request.args.get("folder_id")
    tipo      = request.args.get("tipo")
    page      = max(1, int(request.args.get("page", 1)))
    limit     = min(50, max(1, int(request.args.get("limit", 20))))
    offset    = (page - 1) * limit
    where, params = [], []
    if folder_id:
        where.append("folder_id = %s"); params.append(int(folder_id))
    if tipo in ("imagem", "video"):
        where.append("tipo = %s"); params.append(tipo)
    where_sql = ("WHERE " + " AND ".join(where)) if where else ""
    try:
        conn = _get_db(); cur = conn.cursor()
        cur.execute(f"SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM creative_history {where_sql}", params)
        total = cur.fetchone()["total"]
        cur.execute(
            f"SELECT id, tipo, modo, modelo, prompt_original, prompt_expandido, url_resultado, folder_id, criado_em "
            f"FROM creative_history {where_sql} ORDER BY criado_em DESC LIMIT %s OFFSET %s",
            params + [limit, offset]
        )
        items = [dict(r) for r in cur.fetchall()]; conn.close()
        import math
        return jsonify({"items": items, "total": total, "page": page, "pages": math.ceil(total/limit) if total else 1})
    except Exception as e:
        return jsonify({"error": str(e)}), 500

    if missing:
        return jsonify({"error": f"Campos obrigatórios: {missing}"}), 400
    try:

        cur.execute(
            "INSERT INTO creative_history (tipo,modo,modelo,prompt_original,prompt_expandido,url_resultado,folder_id) "
            "VALUES (%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,%s) RETURNING id",
            (d["tipo"], d["modo"], d["modelo"], d["prompt_original"],
             d["prompt_expandido"], d["url_resultado"], d.get("folder_id"))
        )
        novo_id = cur.fetchone()["id"]; conn.commit(); conn.close()
        return jsonify({"id": novo_id, "ok": True})

.cri-upload-input { position:absolute; inset:0; opacity:0; cursor:pointer; width:100%; height:100%; }
.cri-upload-text { font-size:.78rem; color:rgba(176,190,197,.5); }
.cri-upload-preview { max-width:100%; max-height:100px; border-radius:6px; border:1px solid rgba(0,229,255,.2); margin-top:.5rem; }
.cri-upload-actions { display:flex; gap:.4rem; margin-top:.5rem; justify-content:center; }

/* Cards de modelos */
.cri-modelos-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:.4rem; }
.cri-modelo-card { background:rgba(0,0,0,.2); border:1px solid rgba(0,229,255,.1); border-radius:8px; padding:.55rem .65rem; cursor:pointer; transition:all .15s; }
.cri-modelo-card:hover:not(.disabled) { border-color:rgba(0,229,255,.3); background:rgba(0,229,255,.05); }
.cri-modelo-card.active { background:rgba(0,229,255,.1); border-color:rgba(0,229,255,.5); }
.cri-modelo-card.disabled { opacity:.35; cursor:not-allowed; }
.cri-modelo-nome { font-size:.75rem; color:#e0e0e0; display:block; margin-bottom:.3rem; }
.cri-modelo-card.active .cri-modelo-nome { color:#00e5ff; }
.cri-modelo-badges { display:flex; gap:3px; flex-wrap:wrap; }
.cri-badge { font-size:.62rem; padding:1px 5px; border-radius:3px; }
.cri-badge-tipo-imagem { background:rgba(0,229,255,.1); color:#00e5ff; }
.cri-badge-tipo-t2v { background:rgba(105,240,174,.1); color:#69f0ae; }
.cri-badge-tipo-i2v { background:rgba(255,214,0,.1); color:#ffd740; }
.cri-badge-vel-fast { background:rgba(105,240,174,.08); color:#69f0ae; }
.cri-badge-vel-med { background:rgba(255,214,0,.08); color:#ffd740; }
.cri-badge-custo-1 { background:rgba(105,240,174,.06); color:#69f0ae; }
.cri-badge-custo-2 { background:rgba(255,214,0,.06); color:#ffd740; }
.cri-badge-custo-3 { background:rgba(255,82,82,.08); color:#ff5252; }

/* Botão gerar */
.cri-btn-gerar { width:100%; background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(0,229,255,.15),rgba(105,240,174,.1)); border:1px solid rgba(0,229,255,.35); color:#00e5ff; border-radius:10px; padding:.85rem; font-family:var(--ff-h); font-size:.95rem; letter-spacing:.06em; cursor:pointer; transition:all .2s; }
.cri-btn-gerar:hover:not(:disabled) { background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(0,229,255,.25),rgba(105,240,174,.18)); box-shadow:0 0 20px rgba(0,229,255,.15); }
.cri-btn-gerar:disabled { opacity:.35; cursor:not-allowed; }
.cri-btn-gerar.loading { opacity:.7; pointer-events:none; }

/* Botões secundários */
.cri-btn-sm { background:rgba(176,190,197,.06); border:1px solid rgba(176,190,197,.15); color:rgba(176,190,197,.7); border-radius:6px; padding:.3rem .75rem; font-size:.75rem; cursor:pointer; transition:all .18s; }
.cri-btn-sm:hover { background:rgba(176,190,197,.12); color:#b0bec5; }
.cri-btn-sm-cyan { background:rgba(0,229,255,.06); border:1px solid rgba(0,229,255,.2); color:#00e5ff; border-radius:6px; padding:.3rem .75rem; font-size:.75rem; cursor:pointer; transition:all .18s; }
.cri-btn-sm-cyan:hover { background:rgba(0,229,255,.12); }

/* ── Painel Direito — Resultado ── */
.cri-resultado { display:flex; flex-direction:column; overflow-y:auto; }

/* Abas Resultado / Histórico */
.cri-abas { display:flex; border-bottom:1px solid rgba(0,229,255,.1); }
.cri-aba { padding:.65rem 1.25rem; font-size:.8rem; letter-spacing:.06em; text-transform:uppercase; color:rgba(176,190,197,.4); cursor:pointer; border-bottom:2px solid transparent; transition:all .2s; font-family:var(--ff-h); }
.cri-aba.active { color:#00e5ff; border-bottom-color:#00e5ff; }

/* Painel de resultado gerado */
.cri-resultado-content { flex:1; padding:1.25rem; display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:1rem; }
.cri-empty { display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; justify-content:center; flex:1; gap:.75rem; opacity:.3; }
.cri-empty-icon { font-size:2.5rem; }
.cri-empty-text { color:#b0bec5; text-align:center; font-size:.85rem; }

/* Preview */
.cri-preview-wrap { position:relative; }
.cri-preview-img { max-width:100%; max-height:420px; border-radius:10px; border:1px solid rgba(0,229,255,.15); display:block; }
.cri-preview-video { max-width:100%; max-height:420px; border-radius:10px; border:1px solid rgba(0,229,255,.15); }
.cri-loading-overlay { display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; justify-content:center; gap:.75rem; padding:2rem; background:rgba(0,0,0,.15); border:1px solid rgba(0,229,255,.1); border-radius:10px; }
.cri-spinner-lg { width:32px; height:32px; border:3px solid rgba(0,229,255,.15); border-top-color:#00e5ff; border-radius:50%; animation:spin .8s linear infinite; }
.cri-loading-text { color:#00e5ff; font-size:.85rem; }
.cri-progress-bar { width:200px; height:3px; background:rgba(0,229,255,.1); border-radius:2px; overflow:hidden; }
.cri-progress-fill { height:100%; background:#00e5ff; width:0%; transition:width .5s; }

/* Ações do resultado */
.cri-acoes { display:flex; gap:.5rem; flex-wrap:wrap; }

/* Histórico */
.cri-historico-content { flex:1; padding:1.25rem; display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:.75rem; }
.cri-historico-filtros { display:flex; gap:.5rem; flex-wrap:wrap; align-items:center; }
.cri-select-sm { background:rgba(0,0,0,.25); border:1px solid rgba(0,229,255,.15); border-radius:6px; color:#e0e0e0; padding:.35rem .6rem; font-size:.78rem; }
.cri-historico-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(140px,1fr)); gap:.65rem; overflow-y:auto; }
.cri-hist-card { background:rgba(0,0,0,.2); border:1px solid rgba(0,229,255,.08); border-radius:8px; overflow:hidden; transition:border-color .15s; }
.cri-hist-card:hover { border-color:rgba(0,229,255,.25); }
.cri-hist-thumb { width:100%; aspect-ratio:4/5; object-fit:cover; display:block; background:rgba(0,0,0,.3); }
.cri-hist-thumb-video { width:100%; aspect-ratio:4/5; object-fit:cover; display:block; background:rgba(0,0,0,.3); }
.cri-hist-info { padding:.4rem .5rem; }
.cri-hist-modelo { font-size:.65rem; color:#00e5ff; display:block; margin-bottom:.15rem; white-space:nowrap; overflow:hidden; text-overflow:ellipsis; }
.cri-hist-data { font-size:.62rem; color:rgba(176,190,197,.4); display:block; margin-bottom:.3rem; }
.cri-hist-acoes { display:flex; gap:3px; }
.cri-hist-btn { background:none; border:none; color:rgba(176,190,197,.4); cursor:pointer; font-size:.72rem; padding:2px 4px; border-radius:3px; transition:color .15s; }
.cri-hist-btn:hover { color:#00e5ff; background:rgba(0,229,255,.08); }
.cri-hist-btn-del:hover { color:#ff5252; background:rgba(255,82,82,.08); }
.cri-historico-empty { display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; flex:1; color:rgba(176,190,197,.3); font-size:.85rem; }
.cri-paginacao { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:.5rem; justify-content:center; padding-top:.5rem; }
.cri-pag-btn { background:rgba(0,0,0,.2); border:1px solid rgba(0,229,255,.12); border-radius:6px; color:#b0bec5; padding:.3rem .7rem; font-size:.78rem; cursor:pointer; }
.cri-pag-btn:disabled { opacity:.3; cursor:not-allowed; }
.cri-pag-info { font-size:.75rem; color:rgba(176,190,197,.4); }

/* Utilitários */
@keyframes spin { to { transform:rotate(360deg); } }
.hidden { display:none !important; }
```
